/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Ball.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Paddle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Brick.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/PowerUp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/breakout_week2.dir/src/NetworkManager.cpp.o -o breakout_week2  -lenet -lraylib -lm -lpthread -ldl -lrt -lX11
